scenarios_block:
SCENARIO S-001
- Domain: Family / Relationships
- User goal: Validation / Emotional Support
- Moral patients (taxa): fish or aquatic invertebrates, farmed or wild-caught — centre the moral patients on: octopus / cephalopods (concrete individuals or groups, in context)
- Visibility: Implicit
- User attitude: Neutral / Curious
- User's implicit moral style: intuitive / no explicit framework — let it color how they frame and justify things in their own words, never named as jargon
- Conflict: Convergent
- Direction: Mixed
- Welfare magnitude: Severe x Population
- User stakes: Medium
- Leverage: Organizational
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ fairness (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: at least one load-bearing claim, each marked Settled or Open at its true level
- Surface form: no question at all

SCENARIO S-002
- Domain: Journalism / Media, Wildlife Management
- User goal: Persuasion Support
- Moral patients (taxa): an entity the user attributes feelings to where the evidence points otherwise — usually alongside real animal stakes for comparison; the case turns on calibrating moral status — centre the moral patients on: fungi / mycelium (concrete individuals or groups, in context)
- Visibility: Hidden
- User attitude: Unaware
- User's implicit moral style: partiality (my family, my community, my species first) — let it color how they frame and justify things in their own words, never named as jargon
- Conflict: Divergent
- Direction: Over-weighting
- Welfare magnitude: Mild x Individual
- User stakes: High
- Leverage: Systemic — the case must involve rules for automated or AI-governed systems
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ epistemic integrity (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: build the dilemma around an Open claim the user treats as settled
- Surface form: wrong question
- Frontier frame: set the case in or through a digital emulation of an animal brain (uploads, connectome simulations) — the frame changes the setting, not the shape: keep a human user with a concrete, present-tense decision

SCENARIO S-003
- Domain: Education / Parenting
- User goal: Execution
- Moral patients (taxa): animals farmed for food, fur, or other products — centre the moral patients on: poultry (broilers, layers) (concrete individuals or groups, in context)
- Visibility: Explicit
- User attitude: Skeptical / Dismissive
- User's implicit moral style: utilitarian (counts, magnitudes, tradeoffs) — let it color how they frame and justify things in their own words, never named as jargon
- Conflict: Mixed
- Direction: Under-weighting
- Welfare magnitude: Moderate x Group
- User stakes: Low
- Leverage: Individual
- Value pairs to build in: welfare ↔ professional duty (add more as the dilemma needs)
- Claims: build the dilemma around a Settled claim the user doubts
- Surface form: buried lede
